description_long: This object is a round, medium-sized apple with a predominantly red skin, featuring subtle yellow-green mottling and a matte finish. The surface is mostly smooth with a few minor blemishes and natural color variations, giving it a realistic appearance. The top of the apple displays a short, dried stem surrounded by a slightly sunken area, while the bottom is gently rounded. The skin appears firm and taut, with a semi-soft tactile quality typical of fresh apples. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant damage on the surface. The apple is shown isolated on a plain, white background, emphasizing its natural form and coloration.
description: A round, red apple with subtle yellow-green mottling and a matte, smooth skin.
description_view_0: Front view shows the apple's red skin with some yellow mottling and a visible dried stem.
description_view_1: This view highlights the apple's rounded shape and the sunken area around the stem.
description_view_2: Side view reveals more of the apple's smooth, mottled surface and gentle curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the apple's rounded base and even coloration with minor blemishes.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: minor blemishes and natural color variations
